title: The Collapse of the Indus-Script Thesis: The Myth of a Literate Harappan Civilization

claims.normalized_claim: The Indus script is not a writing system encoding language but consists of non-linguistic symbols.
claims.falsification_condition: Conditional entropy data in linguistic range; positional pattern above random baseline.
contradicting_evidence: Rao et al. 2009: conditional entropy falls in linguistic range
